title: Runko release.created webhook v1
description: Emitted when a release is cut (design.md §14.10.3, decided 2026-07-10; implementation DAG stage 17b). Standalone shape rather than the change-event envelope: that envelope requires a `change` object and releases are not change events. Same process requirements as webhook-envelope.schema.json: HMAC-signed, retried with backoff, dead-letter visible, consumers idempotent on delivery_id, replayable. This is the CD trigger §14.10.1's read-side recipes key on - consumers should stop tag-polling. `spec_version` is additive-only within a major version.

delivery_id.description: Unique per delivery attempt series; stable across retries of the same logical delivery.

version.description: e.g. '1.2.3' - semver unless the project's capability_config.release.versioning is 'manual'.

tag_sha.description: The annotated tag object's SHA; the tag -> commit -> Change chain is the attestation anchor.

target_sha.description: The trunk commit the tag points at.

head_change_key.description: Newest landed Change the release includes; the changelog spans (previous release tag, this Change].

changelog.description: Markdown derived from landed Changes touching the project since the last release tag (§14.10.3). Optional in the webhook when large - fetch via api.release_url.
